keyFindings.description: PR has merge conflicts with main — both this branch and a parallel PR added .legion/implement.json and .legion/retro.json independently. Code changes in packages/opencode-plugin/ do not conflict. Implementer must rebase.
No test verifying spawn limits are enforced after rehydrate() — rehydration code appears correct but is untested for limit enforcement
Misleading rootDescendantCounts.delete(task.sessionID) in error handler — no-op for non-root tasks, only applies to root tasks
taskDepths and rootDescendantCounts maps never pruned — pre-existing pattern, not a regression
